breakdown: This PR fixes a normalization bug in streaming passthrough where LLM-generated rewards_box payloads using non-standard keys ('xp' instead of 'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces' instead of 'gold') were being passed through without proper conversion. The fix adds a normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function that handles fallback keys and removes raw keys after normalization. Test coverage is good with E2E tests verifying the fix, but type safety could be improved with explicit return type annotations and TypedDict for the rewards_box shape.
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() to handle fallback keys (xp→xp_gained, gold_pieces→gold)
Added pop operations to remove raw keys after normalization
Added comment explaining WHY fallback handling is needed for LLM-generated payloads
Added E2E test file to verify normalization via real LLM with messy key generation
